name: Show Desktop
description: Expose the desktop on demand over D-Bus: minimise every ordinary window on the active workspace (native Wayland windows included) and put them back afterwards. Mutter still advertises _NET_SHOWING_DESKTOP but ignores it, and an XWayland client cannot minimise Wayland windows, so desktop widgets that sit on the wallpaper (the money + surf panels) have no way to be revealed from outside the shell. Used by the `panels` launcher on Ctrl+Shift+M.
